citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Radar and lidar do depth imaging: each pixel is a depth value. GPS triangulates position using satellite signals and gives a location as longitude and latitude. Accelerometers measure acceleration in 3 orthogonal dimensions.
